titleStmt.title: SII 9.153: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 153. (A.R. No. 29 of 1904.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT AMBALI, KUDLIGI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1004, 6th year of the reign of Vikramāditya (VI), Dundubhi, Pushya, amāvāsye corresponding to A.D. 1083 January 20 Friday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Kalyāṇa and mentions his feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva as ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirty two-thousand. It records that the Sēnāpati Śivarāja, son of Bhōgadēva who was a descendant of Paśupati-Bhaṭṭa, who had been the chief of Ammeḻe at the time of the Gaṅga king Durvinīta and honoured by that king, caused the construction of the temple of Kalidēva at Ammeḷe, that at his suggestion the Mahājanas of the place made a grant of some plots of land for the service of the god and that the Daṇḍanāyaka Anantapālayya who was in charge of the toll-revenue made a gift of a portion of the toll-revenue and of some plots of land for the service of the gods Kalidēva, Dhavaḷa-Śaṅkaradēva and Kēśavadēva in the same village. The record gives the genealogy of the Chāḷukya kings from Tailapa down to Vikramāditya (VI) and is a little damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē .
vrittaṁ . jalajaprōdbhūtaśakrādyamaramakuṭamāṇikyaśōṇāṁśujāḷāvaḷīcaṁcatpā
dapīṭhaṁ himakudharasutārddhāṁgadattaprasādaṁ salilārkkavyōmasōmānaḷadharaṇisa
�vorātmamūrttiprabhāvaṁ kalidēvasvāmi rakṣikkakhiḷamunivarastōtrapātraṁ triṇētraṁ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
raka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍi
noḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tadvaṁśāvatārameṁtene . kanda . Ānta ripubhū
mipāḷakarantavisi calukyarājyamuditōditamappantire nijabhujadiṁ dhareyaṁ tāḻdidane
seye tailapakṣitipāḷaṁ . vritta . naranāthāgraṇi tailapaṁge taneyaṁ satyāśrayaṁ tatsutaṁ dharaṇī
vallabha vikramaṁ tadanujaṁ tānayyaṇayyakṣitīśvaranātaṁganujaṁ jitāri jayasiṁhaṁ tattanūjaṁ
nripēśvaranantāhavamallanātana magaṁ sōmēśvarōrvvīśvaraṁ . negaḻdi(r)®daṁ bhuvanaikamallananujaṁ cāḷu
kyanārāyaṇaṁ nrigamāndhātadiḷīpadharmmajacaritraṁ vikramākrāṁtadiṁ digadhīśarttoḍe sakkiyā
ge dareyaṁ niḥkaṇṭakaṁ māḍidaṁ jagadoḷvikramacakravarttige samaṁ barppa(ṁ)nnarārbbhūbhujaru .
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ
yadvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ rāji
gacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapāṇḍya
dēvaru noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḻdu
kēsapurada nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . vritta . jalanidhivē
ṣṭitāvanige raṁjipa kuṁtaḷadēśadoḷmanaṁgoḷipa mukhakke nāsikamenippavolirppa noṇaṁbavā
ḍināḍoḷagidu driṣṭi tānenipa kōgaḷināḷkatiramyamāgirammeḷe tiḷakaṁbolirppudamarā
vatiyaṁtesedentu nōrppoḍaṁ . baḷasida nandanāvaḷigaḷiṁ beḷadoppuva ga(ṁ)ndhaśāḷiyiṁ jaḷa
jakuḷaṁgaḷiṁ pikaśukabhramarāḷigaḷiṁcaraṁgaḷiṁ toḷaguva dēvatābhavanadiṁdesadirppa dharā
mararkkaḷiṁ jaḷadhiparītabhūtaḷadoḷa(ṁ)mmeḷe ra(ṁ)myamadeṁtu nōrppaḍaṁ . dharegesedirppa(ṁ) mmeḷe
yaṁ dharaṇīpati durvvinītagaṁgaṁ paramādaradiṁde rājyacihnaṁ berasu kuḍalpaḍedaneseye
paśupatibhaṭṭaṁ . vritta . kamaḷaprōdbhūtavaṁśōttamanamaḷaguṇāḷaṁkritaṁ vēdaśāstrāga
mavidyāpāragaṁ śaṁkarapadayugapaṁkējasadbhaktiyuktaṁ himasētubrātabhūmaṇḍa
ḷaviśadayaśōrāśi śiṣṭēṣṭakalpadrumane(ṁ)ndiṁtī jagaṁ baṇnise paśupatibhaṭṭaṁ jagatkhyātanādaṁ .
kanda . tattaneyaṁ manmārggacaritraṁ cāvuṇḍamayyanīśapādābjōnmattabhramaraṁ viśvāmitrānvaya
vanajavanadivākaranesadaṁ . kramadiṁ tatputraṁ rudramayaṁ mārtaṇḍa mārasiṁgimayaṁ
nāgimaya bhōgimayyaṁ samastaguṇaniḷayaresedarakhiḷōrvvareyoḷu . modaloṁdaydu
kavalparvvida śākhe sahasramāge saphaḷaṁ tānādudu kalpavrikṣadaṁdadoḷodavirdda(ṁ)mmeḷe
yoḷeseva satprabhuvaṁśaṁ . vritta . manucariteṁ caritramamarējyana maṁtrame maṁtra dharmma
nandanana guṇaṁ guṇaṁ ravitanūjana dāname dānaṁ vainatēyana vipuḷōgrasāhasame sāha
sameṁdu nirantaraṁ jagajjanamoldeyde baṇnisuvudu(ṁ)nnatiyaṁ nega(r)ḻdayvadiṁbara . . kanda . Ā nega
(r)ḻda bhōgadēvana sūnu samastādhikāramaṁ śivarājaṁ bhūnāthaṁ kuḍe paḍedaṁ sēnāspadamaṁ
kumāravibhavō(ṁ)nnatiyaṁ . vritta . jalajaprōdbhūtanēṁ nirmmisidano rajatādrīṁdravēṁ tānido
mēṇkalidēvasvāmidēvāyatanasahitavēṁ śaṁbhuvo pēḷimendī nelanellaṁ baṇnisalmāḍisidanese
yaluttuṁgavistīrṇnakūṭāvaḷiyiṁdaṁ kūḍe śōbhākaramene śivarājaṁ dinādhīśatējaṁ . kanda .
palavuṁ vicitrakūṭāvaḷi paṁcāṁga tribhūmikaiḷāśadineseguṁ sale tāṁ tribhuvanatiḷakaṁ ka
lidēvasvāmi nelasidudbhavabhavanaṁ . nānādānadoḷadhikantānene sarvvasvadānamaṁ māḍidanantē
nadhikano śivarājacamūnāthaṁ puṇyamūrtti gōtrapavitraṁ tribhuvanamallakṣitipano
ḷabhimataphalasiddhiverasu baṁda(ṁ)mmeḷeya prabhugaḷgā śivarājaṁ śubhamati dharmmapravriddhiyaṁ
tānaṟupalu . svasti samastavastuguṇamaṇivibhūṣaṇaru śiṣṭēṣṭavibudhaja
napōṣaṇaru prabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayaguṇasaṁpa(ṁ)nnaruṁ sujanaprasannaruṁ
viśvāmitragōtrapavitraruṁ manumārggacaritraruṁ dīnānāthārtthijanaśaraṇaru śrīkali
dēvasvāmicaraṇasmaraṇapariṇatāntaḥkkaraṇarumenippa(ṁ)mmeḷeya śrīmanmahāpra
bhugaḷayvadiṁbaruṁ . kanda . dharege sakanṛpatisaṁvatsaramadu sāsirada nālku vikrama
cakrēśvararājyadabdamāṟāgire duṁdubhi puśyamāsadamavāseyoḷaṁ . saṁkramisa
luttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇaṁ yōgamā vyatīpātaṁ mattaṁ kramadiṁ sūryyagrahaṇaṁ
kratuśataphaḷada sōmavāraṁ kūḍalu . bhavabhavabhavāḷiyiṁdudbhavisida sukritadoḷa
gaṇyapuṇyadinaṁ saṁbhavise śivabhaktilate parvvuvinaṁ dharmmaprayuktaratimudadiṁdaṁ . Antu śu
bhadinaśubhamuhūrttadoḷu śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmiya divyaśrīpādapadmaṁ
gaḷge kanakakaḷaśadoḷtīvida tīrtthōdakadiṁdaṁ dhārāpūrvvaka(ṁ)mmāḍi . kanda . dēvargge sugandhadra
vyāvaḷisahitaṁ trikālapūjege nandādīvige nivēdyakkaṁ pāvanacaitraṁ pavitraṁ parvvabiyakkaṁ .
jāṇarene pūjipargga purāṇadabhaṭṭargga pātrapāvuḷatatigaṁ māṇade khaṇḍasphuṭitaśrēṇiya
paḷevesana posatumāḍuvudakkuṁ . Ūriṁdaṁ baḍagaṇa holavēreya kōgaḷiya hola
da teṁkaṇadeseyā mēreyoḷā gaḍibadoḷaṁ dhāriṇiyaṟuvattu mattarereyaṁ biṭṭaru . ma 60
dēvara naivēdyakkā dēvara hokkaraṇeyiṁda mūḍaṇa deseyoḷu bhūvaḷayadoḷuttama
menalā vibhugaḷgadde mattarondaṁ biṭṭaru . mattaru . 1 . parisūtrada teṁkalpattire nāgalatāda
ḷaṁ virājipa pūgitarusaṁkuḷadōṁṭaṁ bittarisalmūnūṟu kammamaṁ sale biṭṭaru . kamma 300 .
Aṁdaṁdiṁgūroḷagaṇa saṁdāḍuva gāṇavādiyaniteṇneyoḷaṁ nandādīvige dēvarggeṁduṁ na
ḍavantu māḍibiṭṭaramōghaṁ . sale dharmmarūpadiṁ śrīkalidēvasvāmiyallī kopa
ravi taṇḍulavagnitaptamāṣaṁ jalaviṣadaḷasaptadivyamuṁ varttisuguṁ . dēvargge divyada mu
drāvaṇadiṁ puṭṭidartthavappudu sale niḥkēvaḷanaimittikasadbhāvade dharmmabrayakke salvu
du satataṁ . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bhāṇasaverggaḍe manevergga
ḍe pa(ṁ)nnāyadadhiṣṭhāyakananantapāḷayyadaṇḍanāyakaru śrīkalidēvasvāmiya vīḷe
yada puṇyadiṁdalu tiṁgaḷiṁgoṁdeleya hēṟa pa(ṁ)nnāyada suṁkamaṁ sarvvāyaśuddhiyiṁ biṭṭaru .
śrīdhavaḷaśaṁkaradēvara nivēdyakke dēvariṁ mūḍalu biṭṭa garddekamma 300 . Ūroḷagaṇa śrīkēśavadē
vara pūjegaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ dēvara garddeyiṁ baḍagalu biṭṭa gardde kamma 200 dēvara keyyiṁ paḍuvalu mattaru 2 mattaṁ
koḷagadāya maḷiyaḍakeyuṁ naḍuvudu . nāgaradēvarggā dēvariṁ paḍuvalu mattaru 1 mūḍalu gadde kammaṁ 60
Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaru śrīgaṁgādēvi vāraṇāsi prayāgeyarghyatīrttha kurukṣētradalu
kōṭiliṁgamaṁ pratiṣṭhemāḍi sahasrakōṭi kapileyaṁ suvarṇnaratnaṁgaḷiṁdaḷaṁkarisi caturvvēdapāragara
ppa sahasrakōṭi brāhmaṇargge dānaṁmāḍida phalamaṁ paḍevaru Ī dharmmamaṁ kiḍisalmanadaṁdavarigī
tīrtthaṁgaḷalanituṁ kapileymananibaru brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda mahāpātaka phaladiṁ kāra
dattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasa
krimi . kanda . kalidēvasvāmiya padajalaruhaṣaṭcaraṇa
samaṁ . dāsōjaṁ kaṇḍarisidaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.153 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
